a:r.a:t: Lead quality signals exist but are not built into tools, daily workflows, or incentives
Call transfer and outbound teams may sell packages to low quality leads
Call transfer and outbound teams have package-sale and conversion mechanics, while activations are largely tied to tours booked. This creates uneven role pressures across the telemarketing journey
Owner/Member marketing agents contact HGV owner and attempts to sell packages for additional products
Activations team contacts open package holders and convinces them to book their travel dates
Once customer is on property, Marketing team assigns tours
Prospective customers who are transferred to call center from channel partners
Call transfer agents attempt to sell vacation packages to the call-in customers
Prospective customer lists – Hilton Honors members, Diamond members, etc.
Cold call prospective customers received from Marketing team
HGV Sales, Telemarketing & Marketing Process Flows
